testcase.name: validateMobileFlow[MOB_TC_01, Valid 10-digit number, 9876543210, true](1)
testcase.system-out: Suite execution started: NameFieldValidationTests Session started successfully.
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: validateMobileFlow[MOB_TC_02, Leading zero number (invalid as per rule set), 0987654321, false](2)
validateNameFlow[NAME_TC_01, Valid standard name, Yash, Dhiman, true](1)
validateNameFlow[NAME_TC_02, Single chars (negative test case), A, B, false](2)

failure.message: NAME_TC_02 - Invalid input navigated to mobile screen. This is FAIL by rule. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: NAME_TC_02 - Invalid input navigated to mobile screen.
